EDA (Zammad Ticket System)

Dylan Benavides

2026-06-08

Libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(tidytext)
library(ggplot2)
source("FunctionsSQL.R")

Data

raw.sql <- readLines("zammad_db.sql", warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")

Extract tickets

articles.lines <- grep("^INSERT INTO `ticket_articles`", raw.sql, value = TRUE)

article.records <- list()

for (i in seq_along(articles.lines)) {

  recs <- extract.records(articles.lines[i])
  parsed <- lapply(recs, parse.record)

  article.records <- c(article.records, parsed)
}

article.records <- article.records[
  !duplicated(sapply(article.records, `[`, 1))
]

Dataframe

articles.df <- tibble(
  id         = sapply(article.records, `[`, 1),
  ticket.id  = sapply(article.records, `[`, 2),
  type.id    = sapply(article.records, `[`, 3),
  sender.id  = sapply(article.records, `[`, 4),
  body       = sapply(article.records, `[`, 15),
  internal   = sapply(article.records, `[`, 16),
  created.at = ymd_hms(sapply(article.records, `[`, 21))
)
ticket.example <- articles.df %>%
  filter(ticket.id == 250) %>%
  arrange(created.at)

ticket.example
## # A tibble: 2 × 7
##   id    ticket.id type.id sender.id body            internal created.at         
##   <chr> <chr>     <chr>   <chr>     <chr>           <chr>    <dttm>             
## 1 530   250       11      2         "'Se podría in… 0        2023-04-17 15:58:40
## 2 545   250       10      1         "'<div>Buenas … 0        2023-04-20 15:21:14

Clean text

articles.df <- articles.df %>%
  mutate(text.clean = body %>%
           str_remove_all("<[^>]+>") %>%
           str_replace_all("\\\\n", " ") %>%
           str_squish() %>%
           tolower())

User-only data

user.df <- articles.df %>%
  filter(sender.id == "2")

Tokenization

tokens <- user.df %>%
  select(ticket.id, text.clean) %>%
  unnest_tokens(word, text.clean)

data("stop_words")

tokens.clean <- tokens %>%
  filter(!word %in% stop_words$word) %>%
  filter(str_detect(word, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
  filter(str_length(word) > 2)

Top words

top.words <- tokens.clean %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE)
custom.stopwords <- c(
  "saludos","para", "por", "con", "los", "del", "pero", "una", "las", "este", "gracias","favor","hola","buenas","buenos",
  "muchas","tardes","noches","and","the","https","com",
  "lib","work","encuentra"
)

top.words <- tokens.clean %>%
  filter(!word %in% custom.stopwords) %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE)
top.words %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 20)
## # A tibble: 20 × 2
##    word          n
##    <chr>     <int>
##  1 opt         549
##  2 python      262
##  3 error       245
##  4 reference   213
##  5 undefined   206
##  6 bin         188
##  7 databases   177
##  8 install     177
##  9 envs        168
## 10 file        159
## 11 version     158
## 12 module      152
## 13 espacio     144
## 14 tools       139
## 15 estoy       137
## 16 linux       133
## 17 found       131
## 18 datos       128
## 19 instalar    121
## 20 library     114

Top bigrams

remove.bigrams <- c(
  "muchas gracias",
  "buenas tardes",
  "buenos dias",
  "hola equipo",
  "saludos gracias",
  "gracias saludos",
  "en el",
  "en la",
  "lo que",
  "de la",
  "por favor"
)

bigram.counts <- user.df %>%
  select(text.clean) %>%
  unnest_tokens(bigram, text.clean, token = "ngrams", n = 2) %>%
  filter(!bigram %in% remove.bigrams) %>%
  count(bigram, sort = TRUE)
bigram.counts %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 20)
## # A tibble: 22 × 2
##    bigram                  n
##    <chr>               <int>
##  1 reference to          202
##  2 undefined reference   202
##  3 opt python            170
##  4 https github.com      140
##  5 opt tools             127
##  6 not found             114
##  7 mamba3 envs           113
##  8 python mamba3         113
##  9 opt compilers         110
## 10 qt 5.15.8             105
## # ℹ 12 more rows

Ticket-level dataset

ticket.text <- user.df %>%
  group_by(ticket.id) %>%
  summarise(
    text = paste(text.clean, collapse = " "),
    messages = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

Avg messages per ticket

avg.messages.per.ticket <- ticket.text %>%
  summarise(
    avg.messages = mean(messages)
  )

avg.messages.per.ticket 
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   avg.messages
##          <dbl>
## 1         1.82

Human vs AVI Rule

human.words <- c(
  "instalación","install","error","problema","debug",
  "undefined","not","found","compilers","linux",
  "memoria","espacio","archivo","files"
)

iva.words <- c(
  "module","load","python","miniconda","mamba",
  "conda","env","github","slurm","sbatch",
  "command","tools","opt","bin"
)

Classification model

classify.ticket <- function(text) {

  text <- tolower(text)

  human.score <- sum(str_detect(text, human.words))
  iva.score   <- sum(str_detect(text, iva.words))

  if (human.score > iva.score) {
    return("HUMAN")
  }

  return("IVA")
}

ticket.text$category <- sapply(ticket.text$text, classify.ticket)

Split IVA types

iva.env.words <- c("module","load","conda","mamba","python","env","opt","bin")
iva.cmd.words <- c("slurm","sbatch","srun","github","linux","bash","script","run")

classify.iva.subtype <- function(text) {

  text <- tolower(text)

  env.score <- sum(str_detect(text, iva.env.words))
  cmd.score <- sum(str_detect(text, iva.cmd.words))

  if (env.score > cmd.score) {
    return("IVA_ENVIRONMENT")
  }

  return("IVA_COMMANDS")
}
ticket.text$subtype <- ifelse(
  ticket.text$category == "IVA",
  sapply(ticket.text$text, classify.iva.subtype),
  "HUMAN"
)

Final distribution

ticket.text %>%
  count(category)
## # A tibble: 2 × 2
##   category     n
##   <chr>    <int>
## 1 HUMAN      178
## 2 IVA        379
ticket.text %>%
  count(subtype)
## # A tibble: 3 × 2
##   subtype             n
##   <chr>           <int>
## 1 HUMAN             178
## 2 IVA_COMMANDS      280
## 3 IVA_ENVIRONMENT    99

Time analysis

tickets.time <- articles.df %>%
  arrange(ticket.id, created.at) %>%
  group_by(ticket.id) %>%
  mutate(time.diff = as.numeric(difftime(created.at, lag(created.at), units = "mins"))) %>%
  ungroup()

tickets.time
## # A tibble: 1,674 × 9
##    id    ticket.id type.id sender.id body           internal created.at         
##    <chr> <chr>     <chr>   <chr>     <chr>          <chr>    <dttm>             
##  1 1     1         5       2         "'Welcome!\\n… 0        2021-06-28 20:29:50
##  2 104   100       1       2         "'<h1>New Reg… 0        2020-11-27 04:53:55
##  3 105   101       1       2         "'<p>Dear Sir… 0        2020-11-27 08:50:34
##  4 106   102       1       2         "'<h1>New Reg… 0        2020-11-27 20:30:43
##  5 107   103       1       2         "'<p>Hey guy,… 0        2020-11-27 21:59:30
##  6 108   104       1       2         "'<p>Dear Fri… 0        2020-11-28 15:34:36
##  7 109   105       1       2         "'Dear madam … 0        2020-11-30 13:08:10
##  8 110   106       1       2         "'<h1>New Reg… 0        2020-11-30 18:25:25
##  9 111   107       1       2         "'<h1>New Reg… 0        2020-11-30 21:34:52
## 10 112   108       1       2         "'<p>Dear <sp… 0        2020-12-02 05:28:12
## # ℹ 1,664 more rows
## # ℹ 2 more variables: text.clean <chr>, time.diff <dbl>

Avg response time per ticket

response.time <- tickets.time %>%
  group_by(ticket.id) %>%
  summarise(
    avg.response.time = mean(time.diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    total.gaps = sum(!is.na(time.diff))
  )
response.time %>%
  summarise(
    avg.response.time.system = mean(avg.response.time, na.rm = TRUE),
    median.response.time = median(avg.response.time, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
## # A tibble: 1 × 2
##   avg.response.time.system median.response.time
##                      <dbl>                <dbl>
## 1                   12886.                2172.
response.time %>%
  slice_max(avg.response.time, n = 10)
## # A tibble: 10 × 3
##    ticket.id avg.response.time total.gaps
##    <chr>                 <dbl>      <int>
##  1 203                 434608.          1
##  2 365                 293753.          1
##  3 264                 278495.          3
##  4 145                 256985.          7
##  5 453                 249744.          2
##  6 295                 234546.          1
##  7 347                 226070.          3
##  8 281                 219256.          1
##  9 290                 194339.          1
## 10 336                 188724.          1

Human vs system timing split

response.by.sender <- tickets.time %>%
  group_by(ticket.id, sender.id) %>%
  summarise(
    avg.response.time = mean(time.diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

Automation summary

ticket.text %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    iva = sum(category == "IVA"),
    human = sum(category == "HUMAN"),
    pct.iva = iva / total * 100,
    pct.human = human / total * 100
  )
## # A tibble: 1 × 5
##   total   iva human pct.iva pct.human
##   <int> <int> <int>   <dbl>     <dbl>
## 1   557   379   178    68.0      32.0
ticket.text %>%
  count(category, subtype)
## # A tibble: 3 × 3
##   category subtype             n
##   <chr>    <chr>           <int>
## 1 HUMAN    HUMAN             178
## 2 IVA      IVA_COMMANDS      280
## 3 IVA      IVA_ENVIRONMENT    99

Results

ticket.text <- user.df %>%
  group_by(ticket.id) %>%
  summarise(
    text = paste(text.clean, collapse = " "),
    messages = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ticket.text$category <- sapply(ticket.text$text, classify.ticket)

ticket.text$subtype <- ifelse(
  ticket.text$category == "IVA",
  sapply(ticket.text$text, classify.iva.subtype),
  "HUMAN"
)

final.dataset <- ticket.text %>%
  select(ticket.id, text, category, subtype, messages)

library(reactable)

final.dataset %>%
  arrange(category, subtype) %>%
  reactable(
    searchable = TRUE,
    filterable = TRUE,
    pagination = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 20
  )
write.csv(final.dataset, "final_tickets_classified.csv", row.names = FALSE)
